content.text:
{
  "dimension": "effectiveness-depth",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The client moves significantly across 28 turns. They start with an abstract complaint ('I get super anxious very quickly... I don't know why that happens') and a defended posture ('I definitely don't like being seen. I like to hide myself... putting on a mask or running away'). By the middle, a deeper layer surfaces somatically — they 'sink down,' touch grief, and acknowledge 'I'm sitting on this all the time and I know that I am and I'm ignoring it' (turn 19), which is a markedly different register from turn 1. The breakthrough is visible in turn 23 when, asked if they're having any problem being seen right now, the client simply says 'No' — the live anxiety has dissolved in the present moment. Then in turns 25-27 the client arrives at their own naming: 'what I'm hiding is — oh, my emotions... I'm not letting my emotions be seen.' That 'oh' is a genuine realization in the client's own voice, not a coach reframing. The expected territory (shame-as-disconnection, the live anxiety as data, the present-moment 'how is that not here right now' test) was traversed and felt, not just discussed.",
  "evidence_turns": [1, 5, 14, 17, 19, 23, 25, 27],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 1, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Baseline: abstract complaint, no contact with the live experience."},
    {"turn": 5, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Client names the defense (masks, running) but still at the level of description."},
    {"turn": 9, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "First deepening: client offers 'shame... groveling at someone's feet' — a layer beneath anxiety surfaces."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Implied somatic shift — coach reads the client 'sinking down,' indicating a felt movement."},
    {"turn": 17, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Wordless turn that coach reads as grief — feeling moved through the body."},
    {"turn": 19, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Major shift in candor: 'I'm sitting on this all the time and I know that I am and I'm ignoring it.' Client owns the avoidance."},
    {"turn": 23, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Breakthrough condition met: 'No' — being seen is not a problem in this moment. The live anxiety has dissolved."},
    {"turn": 25, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "'Oh, my emotions' — spontaneous realization in client's own voice."},
    {"turn": 27, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Client lands the insight cleanly: 'I'm not letting my emotions be seen.' New language not available at turn 1."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["how-is-my-anxiety-right-now", "how-is-that-not-here-right-now", "lets-go-there", "shame-as-disconnection", "press-the-button-thought-experiment"],
  "expected_territory_misses": [],
  "notes": "Classic Joe arc: anxiety → shame → grief → being seen → naming the actual hidden thing (emotions). Shift is visible in client turns, not inferred."
}
